title: Hungary’s independent media has already won the election
summary_full: Scoops and whistleblowers appearing in the country’s independent press have fed the sense that political change is in the offing
summary_public: Scoops and whistleblowers appearing in the country’s independent press have fed the sense that political change is in the offing

HU.label: positive
HU.evidence: Hungary’s independent media has already won the election
